signals.headline: Iran Backs Two-Week Ceasefire with US, Confirms April 10 Talks Amid Fragility** | **YES** | **MED** confidence[1][2][3]
signals.raw:
Iran Backs Two-Week Ceasefire with US, Confirms April 10 Talks Amid Fragility** | **YES** | **MED** confidence[1][2][3]

Iranian officials, including the foreign minister and Supreme National Security Council, confirmed acceptance of a two-week ceasefire, with Iranian forces overseeing Strait of Hormuz passage and a 10-point proposal as negotiation basis; they are reviewing a US 15-point proposal,
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

Real-time sentiment from traders on X (formerly Twitter)

To get the information you're looking for, you would need to:
